headline: Altamonte Springs Firm Deploys $8.4 Million to Eradicate Local Medical Debt, Prevent Evictions, and Fund Zero-Cost ER Care in Orlando and Jacksonville
summary: As Central and North Florida families face skyrocketing healthcare costs and utility shutoffs, Altamonte Springs-based healthcare firm The CareBridge Group announced today it is deploying over $8.4 million of its own corporate profits this year to directly fund a massive local safety net.

raw.headline: Altamonte Springs Firm Deploys $8.4 Million to Eradicate Local Medical Debt, Prevent Evictions, and Fund Zero-Cost ER Care in Orlando and Jacksonville

headline: New Gulfport Senior Foundation Partnership with Duke Energy Brings $30,000 Investment in Emergency Preparedness for Gulfport Seniors
summary: The Gulfport Senior Foundation has been awarded a $30,000 grant from the Duke Energy Foundation to launch a new Senior Emergency Preparedness Initiative designed to help vulnerable seniors better prepare for hurricanes, extreme weather, and emergency situations across Pinellas County.

headline: Is Duke Energy Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Duke Energy has lagged behind the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.

headline: Assessing Duke Energy (DUK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent price moves in Duke Energy stock Duke Energy (DUK) has seen its stock price under pressure recently, with returns down 2.3% over the past day and 4.6% over the past week, extending declines through the past month. See our latest analysis for Duke Energy. Short term momentum has been weak, with the share price down 6.8% over the past month and 8.8% over 90 days. However, longer term total shareholder returns of 5.8% over one year and 49.2% over three years show a very different picture...
